info.title: HashWatch API
info.description: Backend API for HashWatch — monitor and manage cryptocurrency miners in real-time.

get.summary: List all miners for the authenticated user

post.summary: Submit a new snapshot for a miner
Proxy an HTTP request to a miner
Send restart command to a miner

get.summary: Get all settings for the authenticated user

post.summary: Validate an in-app purchase receipt via RevenueCat
Flash firmware to a miner (OTA update)

get.summary: Get notification preferences for a miner

200.description: Alert type -> enabled map (defaults all true)

put.summary: Update a notification preference for a miner

get.summary: List pool statistics for all miners

post.summary: Add a note to a miner

delete.summary: Delete a note from a miner

get.summary: List alert history for the authenticated user

200.description: Array of alert history items (newest first)

get.summary: List notification history for the authenticated user

200.description: Array of notification history items (newest first)

delete.summary: Clear all notification history for the authenticated user

post.summary: Sync notification history to the server

get.summary: Get alert rules for a miner

200.description: Alert rules (default values if none set)

put.summary: Update alert rules for a miner

get.summary: List pool changes for a miner

post.summary: Record a pool change for a miner

BearerAuth.description: JWT token obtained from /auth/register or /auth/login. Expires in 30 days.

headers.description: Headers to forward (blocked: host, authorization, cookie, etc.)

receipt.description: Base64-encoded App Store / Play Store receipt

valid.description: Whether the entitlement 'pro' is currently active

expiresDate.description: Expiration date of the pro entitlement

NotificationPrefsMap.description: Map of alert type to enabled status

clientToServer.description: Subscribe to real-time updates for a specific miner

serverToClient.description: Successfully subscribed to a miner's updates

heartbeat.description: Server pings every 30s; client must respond with pong or be disconnected
